name: visual-explainer
description: Generate beautiful, self-contained HTML pages that visually explain systems, code changes, plans, and data. Includes Mermaid diagrams, CSS design patterns, and magazine-quality slide deck support for OpenClaw workflows.
author: nicobailon (OpenClaw adaptation by Tommy)

setup.postInstall: Use prompts/*.md as workflow templates. Write outputs to ~/.openclaw/workspace/diagrams, then open with `open` (macOS) or `xdg-open` (Linux).
